mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM trade_order
AND (order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE trade_order SET remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE trade_order SET price = #{price} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE trade_order SET address = #{address} WHERE id = #{id}
